form.formComment: Colt by I Am Invincible facing the starter for the first time. Was runner-up in a trial at Rosehill on April 2 over 1030m. Nice colt fitted with the two good trials, must respect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Colt by I Am Invincible facing the starter for the first time. Was runner-up in a trial at Rosehill on April 2 over 1030m. Nice colt fitted with the two good trials, must respect.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, 2nd of 8 at Newcastle Super 2yo Mdn-Sw on February 28 over 900m, slow going 1.75 len behind Potomac River with 57kg at $3. Won a Warwick Farm trial over 818m on March 30. Solid debut and kept up to the mark with a trial win, go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Was well-supported at debut, 2nd of 8 at Newcastle Super 2yo Mdn-Sw on February 28 over 900m, slow going 1.75 len behind Potomac River with 57kg at $3. Won a Warwick Farm trial over 818m on March 30. Solid debut and kept up to the mark with a trial win, go close.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, did the work up front then tired 5th of 12 at Wyong 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1200m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Tenenbaum carrying 57kg at $3.90. Drawn out again and place prospects look best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Was well-supported at debut, did the work up front then tired 5th of 12 at Wyong 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1200m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Tenenbaum carrying 57kg at $3.90. Drawn out again and place prospects look best.

form.formComment: At debut, raced on the pace before fading 8th of 10 at Randwick Kensington 2yo C&G Osc on March 25 over 1100m, slow going 8 len behind Under Focus carrying 56.5kg at $7.50. Back in class and capable of better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). At debut, raced on the pace before fading 8th of 10 at Randwick Kensington 2yo C&G Osc on March 25 over 1100m, slow going 8 len behind Under Focus carrying 56.5kg at $7.50. Back in class and capable of better.

form.formComment: Kerry Parker trained two-year-old filly lining up for debut. Looked good in a recent trial win. Must be kept safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Kerry Parker trained two-year-old filly lining up for debut. Looked good in a recent trial win. Must be kept safe.

form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Two-year-old filly by Prague out of Salina Dreaming. At the most recent trial finished ninth on March 23 at Hawkesbury over 800m. Hard to tip off dismal trial run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Facing the starter for the first time. Two-year-old filly by Prague out of Salina Dreaming. At the most recent trial finished ninth on March 23 at Hawkesbury over 800m. Hard to tip off dismal trial run.

form.formComment: Filly by Portland Sky making her first appearance. Finished fourth in a Warwick Farm trial over 818m on March 30. Fitted with the wo trials and worth thought.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Portland Sky making her first appearance. Finished fourth in a Warwick Farm trial over 818m on March 30. Fitted with the wo trials and worth thought.

form.formComment: Blake Ryan trained two-year-old filly lining up for first race start. Looked good when an easy trial winner. Slick trial winner but will need luck from the gate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Blake Ryan trained two-year-old filly lining up for first race start. Looked good when an easy trial winner. Slick trial winner but will need luck from the gate.

form.formComment: I Am Invincible filly from Mabkhara on debut. Effortless trial winner at Scone over 900m on April 1. Looking for a good debut performance despite drawing out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). I Am Invincible filly from Mabkhara on debut. Effortless trial winner at Scone over 900m on April 1. Looking for a good debut performance despite drawing out.

form.formComment: Two-year-old filly (Wild Ruler - Unbridled Courage) will no doubt benefit from the four trials prior to her debut today. Was second in a Hawkesbury trial over 800m March 23. Has trialled well enough heading into this, worth thought.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Two-year-old filly (Wild Ruler - Unbridled Courage) will no doubt benefit from the four trials prior to her debut today. Was second in a Hawkesbury trial over 800m March 23. Has trialled well enough heading into this, worth thought.

form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, second last in a small field at Dubbo Boot Prel on March 15 over 1100m, 9 len behind I'm A Beaut with 56kg at $4.80. Needs it easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Was well in the market at debut, second last in a small field at Dubbo Boot Prel on March 15 over 1100m, 9 len behind I'm A Beaut with 56kg at $4.80. Needs it easier.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced greenly throughout the early and middle stages.
